title: Lung's Advanced Infection
description: A Fast-Paced PvP Infection-Style Minigame Modpack for 3+ players. Quickly gather powerful ARPG-like random loot and level up to become stronger. Hunt your friends as the infected or survive until the timer is up as a survivor.
body:
### This Modpack is now ARCHIVED!
I will not longer be working on this modpack, it barely works half the time and some of it's elements are honestly just not interesting to me anymore. All of my available dev time is currently spent working on my "Through" series modpacks which are not directly about PvP and instead have an RPG Survival Multiplayer focus.

## Description
Lung's Advanced Infection A.K.A. "L.A.I." (pronounced like "lie") is a minigame modpack centered around turning the infection minigame into a complex, replayable, and fantastically fun party PvP mode for you and your friends! The default [Infection](https://modrinth.com/datapack/infection) settings are recommended 

## Important Mods!
If you want to go in blind, then L.A.I. can easily be played as such, if you want to get ahead of the game and figure out some of the intricacies of the modpack then these mods are the most valuable to have knowledge of: 

<details>
<summary> Spoilers for Mechanics and Mods </summary>


### Combat and Mobility Changes:
---
Complete Combat Mechanic Rework
#### - [Combatify](https://modrinth.com/mod/combatify)
---
Dashing
#### - [Double Tap Dash](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-tap-dash)
---
Extra Health Bonus
#### - [Health Levels](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-levels)
---


### Looting/Scaling Improvements:
---
Extra Loot from Fishing
#### - [Fishing Aquatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishingaquatica)
---
Every player can loot the same chests
#### - [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr)
---
Compare Equipment Stats in-inventory
#### - [Equipment Compare](https://modrinth.com/mod/equipment-compare)
---
Get Random Loot from Mining
#### - [Mine Treasure](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mine-treasure)
---
Random Armor Attributes
### [Spoorn Armor Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoorn-armor-attributes)
---
Random Weapon Attributes
### [Spoorn Weapon Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoorn-weapon-attributes)
---
Build an army even though they probably won't be very powerfull
### [Tiny Allies](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinyallies)

</details>
